title: Bitcoin Course
description: A sovereign Bitcoin education track curated for cypherpunk learners — from first principles to nodes, privacy, and Lightning. Built on open-source course materials from Plan ₿ Network, presented with Cypherpunk Code's independent branding and editorial framing.

modules.label: Module 1 — The Bitcoin Journey
modules.description: Bitcoin fundamentals: money, mining, wallets, transactions, and the cypherpunk roots of Satoshi's invention.

modules.label: Module 2 — Your First Bitcoins
modules.description: Acquire, secure, and spend bitcoin without custodians.

modules.label: Module 3 — Run a Full Node
modules.description: Verify the chain yourself — sovereignty through infrastructure.

modules.label: Module 4 — Privacy on Bitcoin
modules.description: Reclaim fungibility on a transparent ledger.

modules.label: Module 5 — Lightning Theory
modules.description: How payment channels scale Bitcoin without sacrificing decentralization.

modules.label: Module 6 — Lightning in Practice
modules.description: Operate a Lightning node and route real payments.

modules.label: Module 7 — Wallet Architecture
modules.description: Keys, scripts, and the engineering behind self-custody.

modules.label: Module 8 — Bitcoin's Origins
modules.description: Documented history from cypherpunk mailing lists to global movement.

modules.label: Module 9 — Digital Security
modules.description: OpSec foundations every Bitcoiner needs before touching significant funds.
